docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-10-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RASIKA CHAKRAVARTHY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YASMINE ASHURAEY IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $300.00 SERVED AUG-19-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ASHURAEY, YASMINE DBA SKILLED ATTRACTION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-11-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BY VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RASIKA CHAKRAVARTHY. DEFENDANT YASMINE ASHURAEY NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAKRAVARTHY, RASIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASHURAEY, YASMINE DBA SKILLED ATTRACTION $6,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,214.40 INTEREST, $759.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,573.65, TIME SPENT PREPARING IS NOT A RECOVERABLE COST UNDER CCP 1033.5.
